heading: AWS
subheading: Accelerating Innovation with Secure, Scalable, and Cloud-Native Solutions
content:
AWS empowers organizations to innovate faster by delivering secure, scalable, and cloud-native solutions across infrastructure, data, analytics, and artificial intelligence. Iseyon helps enterprises migrate, modernize, and optimize their technology landscape using Amazon Web Services to improve agility, reduce costs, and accelerate digital transformation.

#### **Cloud Infrastructure & Migration**

Iseyon designs and implements robust cloud architectures on AWS that are secure, scalable, and highly available. Our team supports end-to-end cloud migration strategies, including lift-and-shift, re-platforming, and re-architecting legacy systems. Using services like Amazon Web Services, we ensure seamless transitions with minimal downtime and optimized performance.

#### **Compute, Storage & Networking**

Iseyon builds resilient infrastructure using core AWS services such as Amazon EC2, Amazon S3, and Amazon VPC. Our solutions are designed for high availability, disaster recovery, and performance optimization, enabling businesses to scale dynamically based on demand.

#### **Data Engineering & Analytics**

Iseyon implements modern data architectures on AWS using services like AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, and Amazon Athena. Our team develops scalable ETL pipelines, real-time data processing systems, and analytics platforms that deliver actionable insights from structured and unstructured data.

#### **Advanced Analytics & Business Intelligence**

Iseyon enables data-driven decision-making by integrating AWS data services with visualization and BI tools. Using services such as Amazon QuickSight, we create interactive dashboards and real-time reporting solutions that provide a unified and reliable view of business performance.

#### **Machine Learning & AI Solutions**

Our AWS AI/ML services support the complete machine learning lifecycle using Amazon SageMaker. From data preparation and feature engineering to model training, deployment, and monitoring, we help organizations operationalize AI solutions efficiently and at scale.

#### **Serverless & Cloud-Native Development**

Iseyon builds modern, event-driven applications using serverless services such as AWS Lambda and Amazon API Gateway. Our cloud-native architectures reduce operational overhead, improve scalability, and accelerate development cycles.

#### **Security, Governance & Compliance**

Iseyon implements enterprise-grade security frameworks on AWS using identity management, encryption, and monitoring services. Our approach ensures secure access control, compliance adherence, cost optimization, and automated monitoring to maintain reliable and governed cloud operations.

#### **DevOps & Automation**

Iseyon enables CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure automation using AWS DevOps services. Our solutions improve deployment speed, enhance collaboration, and ensure consistent environments across development, testing, and production.

#### **Seamless Integration & Modernization**

Iseyon helps organizations integrate AWS with existing systems, third-party applications, and on-premise infrastructure. Our modernization strategies ensure a smooth transition to cloud-native environments while preserving business continuity and maximizing return on investment. mobile.

faqs.question: What AWS services does Iseyon provide?
faqs.answer: Iseyon delivers end-to-end cloud solutions using Amazon Web Services, including cloud migration, infrastructure design, data engineering, analytics, AI/ML, serverless development, DevOps automation, and enterprise security. We help organizations modernize their technology landscape while improving scalability, agility, and cost efficiency.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon support AWS cloud migration?
faqs.answer: Iseyon provides comprehensive migration strategies including lift-and-shift, re-platforming, and full re-architecture of legacy systems. Our team ensures minimal downtime, secure data transfer, performance optimization, and business continuity throughout the migration process.

faqs.question: Can Iseyon build scalable and secure cloud infrastructure on AWS?
faqs.answer: Yes, Iseyon designs highly available and resilient architectures using services such as Amazon EC2, Amazon S3, and Amazon VPC. Our solutions include disaster recovery planning, auto-scaling, cost optimization, and enterprise-grade security controls.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon enable data engineering and analytics on AWS?
faqs.answer: Iseyon builds modern data platforms using services like AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, and Amazon Athena. We develop scalable ETL pipelines, real-time processing systems, and analytics environments that deliver actionable business insights.

faqs.question: Does Iseyon provide AI and machine learning solutions on AWS?
faqs.answer: Absolutely, Iseyon supports the complete ML lifecycle using Amazon SageMaker-from data preparation and model training to deployment and monitoring. Our AI solutions help organizations automate processes, enhance predictions, and drive innovation at scale.
